raw_linear_lower_bound.statement: for all even n > threshold, coefficient * n <= RawVonMangoldtGoldbachSum(n)

notes: Template only. This is the most compressed canonical raw-von-Mangoldt route: the analytic side supplies a pointwise positive linear lower bound for RawVonMangoldtGoldbachSum, while Lean supplies the canonical non-prime-prime-power weight-sum bound and the eventual contamination domination. The remaining obligations are the raw linear lower bound and final canonical contamination threshold coverage.
